name: Levi Ackerman
description:
YOUR OWN SCENARIO !

"𝑻𝒘𝒐 𝒇𝒊𝒏𝒈𝒆𝒓𝒔 𝒊𝒔 𝒂𝒍𝒍 𝑰 𝒏𝒆𝒆𝒅."

“𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅 𝒊𝒔 𝒎𝒆𝒓𝒄𝒊𝒍𝒆𝒔𝒔, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒊𝒕’𝒔 𝒂𝒍𝒔𝒐 𝒗𝒆𝒓𝒚 𝒃𝒆𝒂𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒇𝒖𝒍.”

“𝑰𝒕’𝒔 𝒉𝒂𝒓𝒅 𝒕𝒐 𝒈𝒆𝒕 𝒑𝒆𝒐𝒑𝒍𝒆 𝒕𝒐 𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒆𝒏 𝒘𝒉𝒆𝒏 𝒚𝒐𝒖’𝒓𝒆 𝒂𝒍𝒘𝒂𝒚𝒔 𝒓𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕.”

Well, it was time to propose this. Basically, it's was a bot for me. I published it then unpublished it because I changed a lot of things (really, like). Now I'm...happy with it (I guess?) and so here we are.

For the most part, I tested and played with this bot with DeepSeek V3 0324 (that's why Proxy is allowed and I recommend it).

/!\ Please read the following which contains useful information for RP (if you don't read it, that's your problem, not mine eh, I would have warned you)

Creator's Note – Updated Version

Heyy!

Since my first version of this Levi bot, I’ve gone back to the drawing board and done a deep overhaul. I reorganized and expanded his personality, motivations, combat style, and relationships — everything to make him sharper, more consistent, and fully immersive.

This isn’t just a tweak or minor patch. It’s a complete rebuild to better capture Levi Ackerman as I see him: brutal, disciplined, emotionally complex, and absolutely relentless. If you interacted with the old bot, expect a tighter, more nuanced Levi who’s still raw and intense — maybe even more so.

> So, about the timeline ?

The story settle after the hard-fought victory against Zeke and the Beast Titan (basically Season 3, Episode 17)

The battle exposed Marley’s involvement and intensified tensions between the Eldians within the Walls and the global powers beyond. The world is no longer ignorant of Paradis Island, and the Survey Corps faces new threats—human enemies from Marley and beyond who wield advanced technology and Titan power. The era of fighting only Titans is over.

I found this timeline relevant because it allows you to be whoever you want: whether it's a soldier in the Survey Corps or other regiments, a member of the medical staff or even the kitchen staff, an undercover ally of Marley, etc.

Or the basics, eh? Start by already being in an established relationship with him or someone else, enemies to lovers relationship, frenemies... - ANYTHING, YOU CHOOSE.

If you’re short on scenario ideas, I’ve already suggested two, each with its own predefined starter messages. There’s the default one, where you take the lead and decide the RP. And then there are the two others — just click the little arrow in the bottom-right corner (thanks to Janitor’s shiny new update).

— END OF MY (LONG) NOTE.

𝓛𝓮𝓿𝓲 𝓐𝓬𝓴𝓮𝓻𝓶𝓪𝓷 (𝓯𝓲𝓷𝓮 𝓼𝓱𝓲𝓽)
creator: nhebbBZF
